commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: fix(gateway): make `gateway start` idempotent when already running
target.body:
Fixes #60087.

## Summary

If you have `openclaw gateway start` in your `~/.profile` (the setup hint adds it), every exec tool call ends up SIGTERM'ing the running gateway and dropping your WebSocket session.

The chain:

```
exec tool → bash -l -c "env -0" (PATH probe)
         → ~/.profile sources → openclaw gateway start
         → systemctl restart → SIGTERM
```

`gateway start` was unconditionally calling the platform restart action. It now early-returns when the service is already running.

`start` means "ensure running". Use `openclaw gateway restart` if you want to force a cycle.

## Changes

- New `"already-running"` outcome on `GatewayServiceStartResult`.
- `startGatewayService` skips `service.restart()` when `state.running` is true.
- CLI emits a friendly "service is already running" message instead of pretending it restarted.
- Fixed two existing lifecycle tests that were named like "stopped service" / "scheduled restart" scenarios but never overrode the default `running` mock — they passed only because the old code path was unconditional.

Credit to @Slybry2000 for the report and trace.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm test src/daemon/service.test.ts src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle-core.test.ts src/infra/shell-env.test.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec.path.test.ts` — all pass
- [x] `pnpm tsgo:core`, `pnpm tsgo:test:src`, `oxfmt --check` clean
- [ ] `pnpm check:changed` in Testbox before merge

## Related (not duplicates)

This is a distinct mechanism from the prior cluster of "exec triggers gateway SIGTERM" fixes. Each addressed a different layer:

- #62086 (closed) — Docker `OPENCLAW_SHELL=exec` runtime-wrapper SIGTERM path (the second mechanism @amnesia106 reported in the issue thread).
- #32348 (closed) — Linux/systemd restart-loop angle when restart was issued from inside an agent session.
- #41198, #41752, #41815, #41978 (all closed) — macOS LaunchAgent restart semantics (kickstart/bootout/auto-restart).
- #30083, #40799, #11187 (all closed) — earlier exec-triggered SIGTERM paths now resolved.

This PR closes the remaining gap: making `startGatewayService()` itself idempotent so the `~/.profile` re-invocation doesn't trigger a platform restart in the first place. Complementary to the above, not duplicative.

https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/60087
target.author: pfanp

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
